creator: pgollucci@FreeBSD.org
text:
Repo copy requests:

sysutils/rsyslog4*  -> sysutils/rsyslog4-devel*
sysutils/rsyslog5*  -> sysutils/rsyslog5-devel*
sysutils/rsyslog55* -> sysutils/rsyslog6-devel*

AFTER repo copies:
1) rsyslog3 -> 3.22.2
2) rsyslog4 -> 4.6.3
3) rsyslog4-devel -> 4.7.2
4) rsyslog5 ->  5.5.7
5) rsyslog5-devel -> 5.7.0
6) rsyslog6-devel -> 6.1.0
7) Update conflicts as needed; drop rsyslog-2 from conflicts
